topic: Conjunctions (And, But, Or, So, Because, Although, While)
challengeTask: Use at least 10 sentences with Conjunctions (And, But, Or, So, Because, Although, While) in a real conversation or diary entry today.
hindiTask: आज Conjunctions (And, But, Or, So, Because, Although, While) का उपयोग करते हुए कम से कम 10 वाक्य किसी असली बातचीत या डायरी में लिखें।
successCriteria: Conjunctions (And, But, Or, So, Because, Although, While) rule applied correctly in every sentence
bonusChallenge: Record yourself speaking 5 of these sentences and check your pronunciation.
